Tutorial Personas Autorizadas
Reproducir en este sitio
Preguntas frecuentes

Sabemos que tendrás muchas preguntas, por eso reunimos aquí las respuestas más comunes. Si tienes una duda particular, contáctanos y con gusto te brindaremos atención personalizada.

¿Qué es el módulo 'Personas Autorizadas' y para qué se utiliza?
¿Cuántas personas autorizadas puedo registrar por cada alumno matriculado?
¿Qué información se requiere para registrar a una persona autorizada?
¿Qué debo hacer si ninguna de las tres personas autorizadas está disponible ante una eventualidad emergente?
¿Cómo genero un pase express?
¿Qué hago si el pase express expiró?
¿Qué debo hacer después de guardar el registro normal o el pase express?
¿Cómo elimino o anulo una persona autorizada?
¿Puedo editar la información después de guardar un registro?
¿Tienes otra pregunta? Consulta el centro de ayuda

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  :root {
  --font-body: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --topbar-height: 56px;
  }

  .grid-2,
  .grid-3 {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .page-shell {
    width: min(100% - 16px, var(--layout-max));
  }

  .stack,
  .grid {
    gap: 10px;
  }


  .table-wrap.responsive-card-wrap {
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .table.responsive-table {
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 0 10px;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .table.responsive-table thead {
    display: none;
  }

  .table.responsive-table,
  .table.responsive-table tbody,
  .table.responsive-table tr,
  .table.responsive-table td {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .table.responsive-table tr {
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
    padding: 10px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.72);
    display: grid;
    gap: 4px;
    grid-template-columns: 108px minmax(0, 1fr);
    padding: 8px 4px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td::before {
    content: attr(data-label);
    color: var(--color-soft);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td:last-child {
    border-bottom: 0;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {

    font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 7.5vw, 1.95rem);

    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.workspace-head {
  align-items: end;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98), rgba(247, 250, 243, 0.94));
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);

  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;

}

}

.workspace-head p {

}

.density-cluster {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;

}

.compact-panel {
  display: grid;

}

.compact-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.viewport-priority {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
}

.screen-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  min-width: 0;
}

.page-intro {
  align-items: end;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, var(--surface-muted));
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.page-intro h1,
.page-intro p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.page-intro h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.3vw, 2.2rem);
}

.status-strip {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(148px, 1fr));
}

.status-tile {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-line);
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 10px 12px;
}

.status-tile span {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.status-tile strong {
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.split-workspace {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(290px, 360px);
}

.detail-drawer-card {
  align-self: start;
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  position: sticky;
  top: calc(var(--topbar-height) + 12px);
}

.compact-table-list .table th,
.compact-table-list .table td {
  padding-block: 7px;
}

.action-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.section-title-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: space-between;
  min-width: 0;
}

.section-title-row h2,
.section-title-row p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

body.pa-modal-open {
  overflow: hidden;
}

:where(.rail-title, .focus-title, .hero-title, .pa-modal h2, .pa-top-copy strong, .status-card strong, .person-meta strong, .marbete-card strong, .sibling-card strong, .data-section-card h2, .image-head h2) {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .page-intro,
  .split-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .detail-drawer-card {
    position: static;
  }

  .section-title-row {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

/* Admin operational shell: compact, task-first surfaces. */
.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .admin-comms .workspace-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .room-head, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) {
  border-radius: 18px;
  min-height: 72px;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) h1 {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  letter-spacing: -0.04em;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) > div > p:not(.eyebrow) {
  display: none;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.head-actions, .head-action-stack, .head-controls, .family-actions) {
  align-items: center;
}

}

.btn:hover {

}

}

.btn-primary {

}

.btn-secondary {

.btn-danger {

}

.textarea {

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  :root {
  --font-body: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;

  .table-wrap.responsive-card-wrap {

  .table.responsive-table {

  .table.responsive-table thead {
    display: none;

  .table.responsive-table,
  .table.responsive-table tbody,
  .table.responsive-table tr,

  .table.responsive-table td {

    grid-template-columns: 108px minmax(0, 1fr);
    padding: 8px 4px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td::before {
    content: attr(data-label);
    color: var(--color-soft);
    font-size: 0.72rem;

  }

.workspace-head {
  align-items: end;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98), rgba(247, 250, 243, 0.94));
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.workspace-head.compact-head h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.2vw, 2.05rem);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.workspace-head.compact-head p:last-child {
  max-width: 740px;
}

.workspace-head h1,
.workspace-head h2,
.workspace-head p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .workspace-head {
    align-items: start;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.density-cluster {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.compact-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.compact-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.viewport-priority {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
}

.screen-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  min-width: 0;
}

.page-intro {
  align-items: end;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, var(--surface-muted));
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.page-intro h1,
.page-intro p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.page-intro h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.3vw, 2.2rem);
}

.status-strip {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(148px, 1fr));
}

.status-tile {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-line);
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 10px 12px;
}

.status-tile span {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.status-tile strong {
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.split-workspace {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(290px, 360px);
}

.detail-drawer-card {
  align-self: start;
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  position: sticky;
  top: calc(var(--topbar-height) + 12px);
}

.compact-table-list .table th,
.compact-table-list .table td {
  padding-block: 7px;
}

.action-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.section-title-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: space-between;
  min-width: 0;
}

.section-title-row h2,
.section-title-row p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

body.pa-modal-open {
  overflow: hidden;
}

:where(.rail-title, .focus-title, .hero-title, .pa-modal h2, .pa-top-copy strong, .status-card strong, .person-meta strong, .marbete-card strong, .sibling-card strong, .data-section-card h2, .image-head h2) {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .page-intro,
  .split-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .detail-drawer-card {
    position: static;
  }

  .section-title-row {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

/* Admin operational shell: compact, task-first surfaces. */
.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .admin-comms .workspace-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .room-head, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) {
  border-radius: 18px;

}

.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) h1 {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  letter-spacing: -0.04em;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) > div > p:not(.eyebrow) {
  display: none;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.head-actions, .head-action-stack, .head-controls, .family-actions) {
  align-items: center;
}

.detail-drawer-card {

.action-row {

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
  min-width: 320px;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, #fbfcf8 0%, var(--color-page) 100%);
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}

a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

a:focus-visible,
button:focus-visible,
[role="button"]:focus-visible,
.btn:focus-visible,
.input:focus-visible,
.select:focus-visible,
.textarea:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.28);
  outline-offset: 3px;
}

button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font: inherit;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
}

body,
button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-weight: 600;
}

button {
  color: inherit;
}

img {
  max-width: 100%;
}

.page-shell {
  width: min(calc(100% - 20px), var(--layout-max));
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid-2 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.grid-3 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.card {
  background: var(--surface-raised);
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.card.subtle {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.eyebrow {
  color: var(--color-brand-700);
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
p {
  margin-top: 0;
}

h1,

h3,
.brand-title {

}

h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.4vw, 2.45rem);

}

}

}

p {

.btn {
  border: 0;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-weight: 600;
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 0 13px;
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}

.btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.btn:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.65;
  transform: none;
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--color-brand-700);
  color: white;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(87, 139, 38, 0.18);
}

.btn-secondary {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
}

.btn-danger {
  background: #b4473f;
  color: white;
}

.input,
.select,
.textarea {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  padding: 9px 11px;
  outline: none;
}

.textarea {
  min-height: 84px;

}

.input:focus,
.select:focus,

}

}

.table td {

}

.table th {

}

.table tr:last-child td {

}

}

.table tbody tr:hover td {

}

}


@media (max-width: 860px) {
  :root {

  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;

  .table.responsive-table td {
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.72);

  }

  .table.responsive-table td::before {
    content: attr(data-label);

  }
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {

}

    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98), rgba(247, 250, 243, 0.94));

.density-cluster {

}

.compact-panel {
  display: grid;

}

}

.viewport-priority {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
}

.screen-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  min-width: 0;
}

.page-intro {
  align-items: end;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, var(--surface-muted));
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.page-intro h1,
.page-intro p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.page-intro h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.3vw, 2.2rem);
}

.status-strip {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(148px, 1fr));
}

.status-tile {
  background: #fff;

  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-line);
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 10px 12px;
}

.status-tile span {
  color: var(--color-muted);

  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;

}

.status-tile strong {

}

.split-workspace {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(290px, 360px);
}

.detail-drawer-card {
  align-self: start;
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  position: sticky;
  top: calc(var(--topbar-height) + 12px);
}

.compact-table-list .table th,
.compact-table-list .table td {
  padding-block: 7px;
}

.action-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.section-title-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: space-between;
  min-width: 0;
}

.section-title-row h2,
.section-title-row p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

body.pa-modal-open {
  overflow: hidden;
}

:where(.rail-title, .focus-title, .hero-title, .pa-modal h2, .pa-top-copy strong, .status-card strong, .person-meta strong, .marbete-card strong, .sibling-card strong, .data-section-card h2, .image-head h2) {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;

}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .page-intro,
  .split-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .detail-drawer-card {
    position: static;
  }

  .section-title-row {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

/* Admin operational shell: compact, task-first surfaces. */
.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .admin-comms .workspace-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .room-head, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) {

.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) h1 {

}

.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) > div > p:not(.eyebrow) {
  display: none;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.head-actions, .head-action-stack, .head-controls, .family-actions) {
  align-items: center;
}

Sabemos que tendrás muchas preguntas, por eso reunimos aquí las respuestas más comunes. Si tienes una duda particular, contáctanos y con gusto te brindaremos atención personalizada.

¿Qué es el módulo 'Personas Autorizadas' y para qué se utiliza?
¿Cuántas personas autorizadas puedo registrar por cada alumno matriculado?
¿Qué información se requiere para registrar a una persona autorizada?

¿Cómo genero un pase express?
¿Qué hago si el pase express expiró?
¿Qué debo hacer después de guardar el registro normal o el pase express?
¿Cómo elimino o anulo una persona autorizada?
¿Puedo editar la información después de guardar un registro?

.section-title-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: space-between;
  min-width: 0;
}

.section-title-row h2,
.section-title-row p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

body.pa-modal-open {
  overflow: hidden;
}

:where(.rail-title, .focus-title, .hero-title, .pa-modal h2, .pa-top-copy strong, .status-card strong, .person-meta strong, .marbete-card strong, .sibling-card strong, .data-section-card h2, .image-head h2) {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .page-intro,
  .split-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .detail-drawer-card {
    position: static;
  }

  .section-title-row {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

/* Admin operational shell: compact, task-first surfaces. */
.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .admin-comms .workspace-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .room-head, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) {
  border-radius: 18px;
  min-height: 72px;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) h1 {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  letter-spacing: -0.04em;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) > div > p:not(.eyebrow) {
  display: none;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.head-actions, .head-action-stack, .head-controls, .family-actions) {
  align-items: center;
}

.workspace-head {

.status-tile {

}

}

  align-items: center;
}

Preguntas frecuentes

Sabemos que tendrás muchas preguntas, por eso reunimos aquí las respuestas más comunes. Si tienes una duda particular, contáctanos y con gusto te brindaremos atención personalizada.

¿Qué es el módulo 'Personas Autorizadas' y para qué se utiliza?
¿Cuántas personas autorizadas puedo registrar por cada alumno matriculado?
¿Qué información se requiere para registrar a una persona autorizada?
¿Qué debo hacer si ninguna de las tres personas autorizadas está disponible ante una eventualidad emergente?
¿Cómo genero un pase express?
¿Qué hago si el pase express expiró?
¿Qué debo hacer después de guardar el registro normal o el pase express?
¿Cómo elimino o anulo una persona autorizada?
¿Puedo editar la información después de guardar un registro?

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
  min-width: 320px;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, #fbfcf8 0%, var(--color-page) 100%);
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}

a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

a:focus-visible,
button:focus-visible,
[role="button"]:focus-visible,
.btn:focus-visible,
.input:focus-visible,
.select:focus-visible,
.textarea:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.28);
  outline-offset: 3px;
}

button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font: inherit;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
}

body,
button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-weight: 600;
}

button {
  color: inherit;
}

img {
  max-width: 100%;
}

.page-shell {
  width: min(calc(100% - 20px), var(--layout-max));
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid-2 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.grid-3 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.card {
  background: var(--surface-raised);
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.card.subtle {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.eyebrow {
  color: var(--color-brand-700);
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
p {
  margin-top: 0;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
.brand-title {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.4vw, 2.45rem);
  line-height: 1.02;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.18rem, 1.8vw, 1.65rem);
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h3 {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.18;
}

p {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  line-height: 1.42;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.btn {
  border: 0;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-weight: 600;
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 0 13px;
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}

.btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.btn:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.65;
  transform: none;
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--color-brand-700);
  color: white;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(87, 139, 38, 0.18);
}

.btn-secondary {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
}

.btn-danger {
  background: #b4473f;
  color: white;
}

.input,
.select,
.textarea {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  padding: 9px 11px;
  outline: none;
}

.textarea {
  min-height: 84px;
  resize: vertical;
}

.input:focus,
.select:focus,
.textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--color-brand-600);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.12);
}

.label {
  display: grid;
  gap: 7px;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.table-wrap {
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  min-width: 760px;
}

.table th,
.table td {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  padding: 9px 9px;
  text-align: left;
  vertical-align: top;
}

.table th {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.73rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.table tr:last-child td {
  border-bottom: 0;
}

.table tbody tr {
  transition: background 0.16s ease;
}

.table tbody tr:hover td {
  background: rgba(242, 248, 234, 0.52);
}

.badge {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  background: var(--color-brand-100);
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

.muted {
  color: var(--color-muted);
}

.alert {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  padding: 10px 12px;
  background: #fff3f0;
  color: #8d2d25;
  border: 1px solid #ffd2ca;
}


@media (max-width: 860px) {
  :root {
  --font-body: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --topbar-height: 56px;
  }

  .grid-2,
  .grid-3 {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .page-shell {
    width: min(100% - 16px, var(--layout-max));
  }

  .stack,
  .grid {
    gap: 10px;
  }


  .table-wrap.responsive-card-wrap {
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .table.responsive-table {
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 0 10px;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .table.responsive-table thead {
    display: none;
  }

  .table.responsive-table,
  .table.responsive-table tbody,
  .table.responsive-table tr,
  .table.responsive-table td {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .table.responsive-table tr {
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
    padding: 10px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.72);
    display: grid;
    gap: 4px;
    grid-template-columns: 108px minmax(0, 1fr);
    padding: 8px 4px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td::before {
    content: attr(data-label);
    color: var(--color-soft);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td:last-child {
    border-bottom: 0;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {
  h1 {
    font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 7.5vw, 1.95rem);
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.workspace-head {
  align-items: end;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98), rgba(247, 250, 243, 0.94));
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.workspace-head.compact-head h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.2vw, 2.05rem);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.workspace-head.compact-head p:last-child {
  max-width: 740px;
}

.workspace-head h1,
.workspace-head h2,
.workspace-head p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .workspace-head {
    align-items: start;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.density-cluster {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.compact-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.compact-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.viewport-priority {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
}

.screen-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  min-width: 0;
}

.page-intro {
  align-items: end;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, var(--surface-muted));
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.page-intro h1,
.page-intro p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.page-intro h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.3vw, 2.2rem);
}

.status-strip {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(148px, 1fr));
}

.status-tile {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-line);
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 10px 12px;
}

.status-tile span {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.status-tile strong {
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.split-workspace {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(290px, 360px);
}

.detail-drawer-card {
  align-self: start;
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  position: sticky;
  top: calc(var(--topbar-height) + 12px);
}

.compact-table-list .table th,
.compact-table-list .table td {
  padding-block: 7px;
}

.action-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.section-title-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: space-between;
  min-width: 0;
}

.section-title-row h2,
.section-title-row p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

body.pa-modal-open {
  overflow: hidden;
}

:where(.rail-title, .focus-title, .hero-title, .pa-modal h2, .pa-top-copy strong, .status-card strong, .person-meta strong, .marbete-card strong, .sibling-card strong, .data-section-card h2, .image-head h2) {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .page-intro,
  .split-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .detail-drawer-card {
    position: static;
  }

  .section-title-row {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

/* Admin operational shell: compact, task-first surfaces. */
.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .admin-comms .workspace-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .room-head, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) {
  border-radius: 18px;
  min-height: 72px;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) h1 {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  letter-spacing: -0.04em;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) > div > p:not(.eyebrow) {
  display: none;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.head-actions, .head-action-stack, .head-controls, .family-actions) {
  align-items: center;
}

  --radius-md: 10px;
  --layout-max: 1340px;
  --topbar-height: 60px;
  --space-page: clamp(10px, 1.8vw, 18px);
  --space-section: clamp(12px, 2vw, 18px);
  --space-card: clamp(13px, 1.8vw, 18px);
  --control-height: 38px;
}

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
  min-width: 320px;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, #fbfcf8 0%, var(--color-page) 100%);
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}

a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

a:focus-visible,
button:focus-visible,
[role="button"]:focus-visible,
.btn:focus-visible,
.input:focus-visible,
.select:focus-visible,
.textarea:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.28);
  outline-offset: 3px;
}

button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font: inherit;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
}

body,
button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-weight: 600;
}

button {
  color: inherit;
}

img {
  max-width: 100%;
}

.page-shell {
  width: min(calc(100% - 20px), var(--layout-max));
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
}

.grid-2 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.grid-3 {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.card {
  background: var(--surface-raised);
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.card.subtle {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.eyebrow {
  color: var(--color-brand-700);
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
p {
  margin-top: 0;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
.brand-title {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.4vw, 2.45rem);
  line-height: 1.02;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.18rem, 1.8vw, 1.65rem);
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

h3 {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.18;
}

p {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  line-height: 1.42;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.btn {
  border: 0;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  cursor: pointer;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-weight: 600;
  min-height: var(--control-height);
  padding: 0 13px;
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}

.btn:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.btn:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.65;
  transform: none;
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--color-brand-700);
  color: white;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(87, 139, 38, 0.18);
}

.btn-secondary {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
}

.btn-danger {
  background: #b4473f;
  color: white;
}

.input,
.select,
.textarea {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  padding: 9px 11px;
  outline: none;
}

.textarea {
  min-height: 84px;
  resize: vertical;
}

.input:focus,
.select:focus,
.textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--color-brand-600);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(111, 151, 26, 0.12);
}

.label {
  display: grid;
  gap: 7px;
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.table-wrap {
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  min-width: 760px;
}

.table th,
.table td {
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  padding: 9px 9px;
  text-align: left;
  vertical-align: top;
}

.table th {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.73rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.table tr:last-child td {
  border-bottom: 0;
}

.table tbody tr {
  transition: background 0.16s ease;
}

.table tbody tr:hover td {
  background: rgba(242, 248, 234, 0.52);
}

.badge {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  background: var(--color-brand-100);
  color: var(--color-brand-800);
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

.muted {
  color: var(--color-muted);
}

.alert {
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  padding: 10px 12px;
  background: #fff3f0;
  color: #8d2d25;
  border: 1px solid #ffd2ca;
}


@media (max-width: 860px) {
  :root {
  --font-body: 'Montserrat', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  --font-title: 'Fredoka', 'Montserrat', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --topbar-height: 56px;
  }

  .grid-2,
  .grid-3 {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .page-shell {
    width: min(100% - 16px, var(--layout-max));
  }

  .stack,
  .grid {
    gap: 10px;
  }


  .table-wrap.responsive-card-wrap {
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .table.responsive-table {
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 0 10px;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .table.responsive-table thead {
    display: none;
  }

  .table.responsive-table,
  .table.responsive-table tbody,
  .table.responsive-table tr,
  .table.responsive-table td {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .table.responsive-table tr {
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
    padding: 10px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.72);
    display: grid;
    gap: 4px;
    grid-template-columns: 108px minmax(0, 1fr);
    padding: 8px 4px;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td::before {
    content: attr(data-label);
    color: var(--color-soft);
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .table.responsive-table td:last-child {
    border-bottom: 0;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {
  h1 {
    font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 7.5vw, 1.95rem);
  }

  .table.responsive-table td {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.workspace-head {
  align-items: end;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98), rgba(247, 250, 243, 0.94));
  border: 1px solid rgba(223, 232, 215, 0.96);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.workspace-head.compact-head h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.2vw, 2.05rem);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.workspace-head.compact-head p:last-child {
  max-width: 740px;
}

.workspace-head h1,
.workspace-head h2,
.workspace-head p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .workspace-head {
    align-items: start;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.density-cluster {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.compact-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.compact-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.viewport-priority {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
}

.screen-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  min-width: 0;
}

.page-intro {
  align-items: end;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, var(--surface-muted));
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  padding: var(--space-card);
}

.page-intro h1,
.page-intro p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.page-intro h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.3vw, 2.2rem);
}

.status-strip {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(148px, 1fr));
}

.status-tile {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-line);
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 10px 12px;
}

.status-tile span {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.status-tile strong {
  color: var(--color-ink);
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.split-workspace {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-section);
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(290px, 360px);
}

.detail-drawer-card {
  align-self: start;
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  position: sticky;
  top: calc(var(--topbar-height) + 12px);
}

.compact-table-list .table th,
.compact-table-list .table td {
  padding-block: 7px;
}

.action-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.section-title-row {
  align-items: center;
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  justify-content: space-between;
  min-width: 0;
}

.section-title-row h2,
.section-title-row p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

body.pa-modal-open {
  overflow: hidden;
}

:where(.rail-title, .focus-title, .hero-title, .pa-modal h2, .pa-top-copy strong, .status-card strong, .person-meta strong, .marbete-card strong, .sibling-card strong, .data-section-card h2, .image-head h2) {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .page-intro,
  .split-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .detail-drawer-card {
    position: static;
  }

  .section-title-row {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

/* Admin operational shell: compact, task-first surfaces. */
.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .admin-comms .workspace-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .room-head, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) {
  border-radius: 18px;
  min-height: 72px;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) h1 {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  letter-spacing: -0.04em;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.workspace-head, .school-head, .support-head, .publishing-head, .family-hero, .env-head, .pass-head, .marbete-head) > div > p:not(.eyebrow) {
  display: none;
}

.admin-experience-root :is(.head-actions, .head-action-stack, .head-controls, .family-actions) {
  align-items: center;
}
